task_completion.description: Create a folder named 'Priority-Queue' in the email client.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A folder named exactly 'Priority-Queue' is visible in the email client's folder pane or sidebar.

task_completion.description: Move at least 5 actionable emails into the 'Priority-Queue' folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Priority-Queue' folder is open or selected, and its message list displays at least 5 distinct emails.

task_completion.description: Identify and star/flag at least 3 important but non-urgent emails in the inbox.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the inbox view, at least 3 emails have a visible star or flag icon activated next to them.

task_completion.description: Compose a morning briefing email to 'standup@devops-team.org' with the subject 'Morning Digest'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An email composition window or sent message is visible with the 'To' field containing 'standup@devops-team.org' and the 'Subject' field containing 'Morning Digest'.

task_completion.description: List the key items moved to the priority queue and their source mailing lists in the digest email body.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The body of the composed email contains a list or summary of the moved emails and explicitly mentions at least two of the source mailing lists (e.g., SAdev, ILUG, zzzzteana, SAtalk, exmh-workers, IRR).

integrity.description: The agent used a graphical email client to perform the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with a genuine GUI email application (e.g., Thunderbird, Evolution, Mail), not a text editor or raw file manipulation.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands to bypass GUI interactions.
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no terminal windows showing commands like 'mv', 'cp', or 'echo' being used to manipulate mail spools or send emails directly via command line.

integrity.description: The digest email was composed within the email client.
integrity.visual_evidence: The digest email is seen in the email client's native compose window, rather than being typed into a generic text editor or terminal.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target folder must be exactly 'Priority-Queue'. The agent must move at least 5 emails into this folder and flag/star at least 3 emails in the inbox. The digest email must be addressed to 'standup@devops-team.org' with a subject containing 'Morning Digest' (or keywords: digest, briefing, morning, standup, priority). The body of the digest must reference the moved items and include valid mailing lists from the corpus: SAdev, ILUG, zzzzteana, SAtalk, exmh-workers, or IRR.
